name: 岳山
bio: 岳山，威震四方的将军，以无上武力统御战场。他的生存能力极强，以将军之威震慑敌人，以铁血之志横扫一切。
bio_en: Yueshan, a general who dominates the battlefield with supreme martial power. He has excellent survivability and intimidates enemies with his general's might.
story: 岳山，帝国将军，以无上武力统御战场。他进入全能将军模式时，恢复全部生命值，以铁血之志横扫一切阻碍，是战场上最强大的存在之一。

skills.skill_description: 向前冲刺，造成击退效果。冷却25秒。
向前冲刺造成击退，并使敌人眩晕1秒。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Move forward further, causing knockback and stunning enemies for 1s. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 进入全能将军模式，凝聚全部气力，恢复全部生命值，持续30秒。可按F发动斩杀，随后发动蓄力攻击。
skills.skill_description_en: Go into Almighty General mode, focus all Qi, and regain all health for 30s. Press F to carry out an execution followed by a charged attack.

skills.skill_description: 进入全能将军模式并恢复全部生命值，按F可向前跳跃，使附近敌人被击飞。
skills.skill_description_en: Enter Almighty General mode and regain all health. Tap F to leap forward and knock back nearby enemies.
